help.verdi archive: Create, inspect and import AiiDA archives.
help.verdi archive create: Create an archive from all or part of a profiles's data.
help.verdi archive import: Import archived data to a profile.
help.verdi archive info: Summarise the contents of an archive.
help.verdi archive inspect: (Deprecated) Inspect contents of an archive without importing it.
help.verdi archive migrate: Migrate an archive to a more recent schema version.
help.verdi archive version: Print the current version of an archive's schema.
help.verdi calcjob cleanworkdir: Clean all content of all output remote folders of calcjobs.
help.verdi calcjob gotocomputer: Open a shell in the remote folder on the calcjob.
help.verdi calcjob inputcat: Show the contents of one of the calcjob input files.
help.verdi calcjob inputls: Show the list of the generated calcjob input files.
help.verdi calcjob outputcat: Show the contents of one of the calcjob retrieved outputs.
help.verdi calcjob outputls: Show the list of the retrieved calcjob output files.
help.verdi calcjob remotecat: Show the contents of a file in the remote working directory.
help.verdi calcjob res: Print data from the result output Dict node of a calcjob.
help.verdi code create core.code.abstract: Abstract data plugin representing an executable code.
help.verdi code create core.code.containerize: Data plugin representing an executable code in container on a remote computer.
help.verdi code create core.code.installed: Data plugin representing an executable code on a remote computer.
help.verdi code create core.code.installed.sh: Code that represents a shell command.
help.verdi code create core.code.portable: Data plugin representing an executable code stored in AiiDA's storage.
help.verdi code duplicate: Duplicate a code allowing to change some parameters.
help.verdi code export: Export code to a yaml file.
help.verdi code hide: Hide one or more codes from `verdi code list`.
help.verdi code reveal: Reveal one or more hidden codes in `verdi code list`.
help.verdi code setup: (Deprecated) Setup a new code (use `verdi code create`).
help.verdi code show: Display detailed information for a code.
help.verdi code test: Run tests for the given code to check whether it is usable.
help.verdi computer configure: Configure the transport for a computer and user.
help.verdi computer configure show: Show the current configuration for a computer.
help.verdi computer disable: Disable the computer for the given user.
help.verdi computer duplicate: Duplicate a computer allowing to change some parameters.
help.verdi computer enable: Enable the computer for the given user.
help.verdi computer export: Export the setup or configuration of a computer.
help.verdi computer export config: Export computer transport configuration for a user to a YAML file.
help.verdi computer export setup: Export computer setup to a YAML file.
help.verdi computer goto: Open a shell connecting to the remote computer.
help.verdi computer show: Show detailed information for a computer.
help.verdi computer test: Test the connection to a computer.
help.verdi config caching: List caching-enabled process types for the current profile.
help.verdi config downgrade: Print a configuration, downgraded to a specific version.
help.verdi config get: Get the value of an AiiDA option for the current profile.
help.verdi config list: List AiiDA options for the current profile.
help.verdi config show: Show details of an AiiDA option for the current profile.
help.verdi daemon decr: Remove NUMBER [default=1] workers from the running daemon.
help.verdi daemon incr: Add NUMBER [default=1] workers to the running daemon.
help.verdi daemon logshow: Show the log of the daemon, press CTRL+C to quit.
help.verdi daemon start: Start the daemon with NUMBER workers.
help.verdi daemon start-circus: This will actually launch the circus daemon, either daemonized in the background or in the foreground.
help.verdi daemon status: Print the status of the current daemon or all daemons.
help.verdi daemon worker: Run a single daemon worker in the current interpreter.
help.verdi data: Inspect, create and manage data nodes.
help.verdi data core.cif: Manipulate CifData objects (crystal structures in .cif format).
help.verdi data core.cif content: Show the content of the CIF file.
help.verdi data core.remote: Manipulate RemoteData objects (reference to remote folders).
help.verdi data core.remote cat: Show content of a file in a RemoteData object.
help.verdi data core.remote ls: List content of a (sub)directory in a RemoteData object.
help.verdi data core.remote show: Show information for a RemoteData object.
help.verdi data core.remote size: Obtain the total size of a file or directory at a given path that is stored via a ``RemoteData`` object.
help.verdi data core.singlefile content: Show the content of the file.
help.verdi data core.structure import: Import a crystal structure from file into a StructureData object.
help.verdi data core.structure import aiida-x: Import structure in XYZ format using AiiDA's internal importer
help.verdi data core.structure import ase: Import structure with the ase library that supports a number of different formats
help.verdi data core.trajectory list: List TrajectoryData objects stored in the database.
help.verdi data core.upf exportfamily: (Deprecated) Export a pseudopotential family into a folder.
help.verdi data core.upf import: (Deprecated) Import a UPF pseudopotential from a file.
help.verdi data core.upf listfamilies: (Deprecated) List all UPF families that exist in the database.
help.verdi data core.upf uploadfamily: (Deprecated) Create a new UPF family from a folder of UPF files.
help.verdi devel check-load-time: Check for common indicators that slowdown `verdi`.
help.verdi devel check-undesired-imports: Check that verdi does not import python modules it shouldn't.
help.verdi devel play: Play the Aida triumphal march by Giuseppe Verdi.
help.verdi devel rabbitmq queues: Commands to interact with RabbitMQ queues.
help.verdi devel rabbitmq tasks revive: Revive processes that seem stuck and are no longer reachable.
help.verdi devel run-sql: Run a raw SQL command on the profile database (only available for 'core.psql_dos' storage).
help.verdi devel validate-plugins: Validate all plugins by checking they can be loaded.
help.verdi group: Create, inspect and manage groups of nodes.
help.verdi group create: Create an empty group with a given label.
help.verdi group delete: Delete groups and (optionally) the nodes they contain.
help.verdi group description: Change the description of a group.
help.verdi group dump: Dump data of an AiiDA group to disk.
help.verdi group list: Show a list of existing groups.
help.verdi group move-nodes: Move the specified NODES from one group to another.
help.verdi group path: Inspect groups of nodes, with delimited label paths.
help.verdi group path ls: Show a list of existing group paths.
help.verdi group relabel: Change the label of a group.
help.verdi group show: Show information for a given group.
help.verdi node attributes: Show the attributes of one or more nodes.
help.verdi node comment: Inspect, create and manage node comments.
help.verdi node comment add: Add a comment to one or more nodes.
help.verdi node comment remove: Remove a comment of a node.
help.verdi node comment show: Show the comments of one or multiple nodes.
help.verdi node comment update: Update a comment of a node.
help.verdi node delete: Delete nodes from the provenance graph.
help.verdi node description: View or set the description of one or more nodes.
help.verdi node extras: Show the extras of one or more nodes.
help.verdi node graph: Create visual representations of the provenance graph.
help.verdi node graph generate: Generate a graph from one or multiple root nodes.
help.verdi node label: View or set the label of one or more nodes.
help.verdi node list: Query all nodes with optional filtering and ordering.
help.verdi node rehash: Recompute the hash for nodes in the database.
help.verdi node repo: Inspect the content of a node repository folder.
help.verdi node repo cat: Output the content of a file in the node repository folder.
help.verdi node repo dump: Copy the repository files of a node to an output directory.
help.verdi node repo ls: List files in the node repository folder.
help.verdi node show: Show generic information on one or more nodes.
help.verdi plugin list: Display a list of all available plugins.
help.verdi presto: Set up a new profile in a jiffy.
help.verdi process dump: Dump process input and output files to disk.
help.verdi process report: Show the log report of processes.
help.verdi process watch: Watch the state transitions of processes.
help.verdi profile: Inspect and manage the configured profiles.
help.verdi profile dump: Dump all data in an AiiDA profile's storage to disk.
help.verdi profile list: Display a list of all available profiles.
help.verdi profile set-default: Set a profile as the default profile.
help.verdi profile setdefault: (Deprecated) Set a profile as the default profile.
help.verdi profile setup core.psql_dos: An AiiDA storage backend that stores data in a PostgreSQL database and disk-objectstore repository.
help.verdi profile setup core.sqlite_dos: A lightweight storage that is easy to install.
help.verdi profile setup core.sqlite_zip: A read-only backend for a sqlite/zip format.
help.verdi quicksetup: (Deprecated) Setup a new profile in a fully automated fashion.
help.verdi restapi: Run the AiiDA REST API server.
help.verdi run: Execute scripts with preloaded AiiDA environment.
help.verdi setup: (Deprecated) Setup a new profile (use `verdi profile setup`).
help.verdi shell: Start a python shell with preloaded AiiDA environment.
help.verdi storage: Inspect and manage stored data for a profile.
help.verdi storage backup: Backup the data storage of a profile.
help.verdi storage info: Summarise the contents of the storage.
help.verdi storage integrity: Checks for the integrity of the data storage.
help.verdi storage maintain: Performs maintenance tasks on the repository.
help.verdi storage migrate: Migrate the storage to the latest schema version.
help.verdi storage version: Print the current version of the storage schema.
help.verdi user configure: Configure a new or existing user.
help.verdi user list: Show a list of all users.
help.verdi user set-default: Set a user as the default user for the profile.
